cards.back: A boosting algorithm that combines a weak learner with the weighted error reduction at each iteration
A bagging technique that uses the weights from training to determine the importance of each sample
A technique that combines multiple models trained on different subsets of the data to improve overall performance
In Adaboost, stumping occurs when the first model is the base learner and the other models are the decision trees that try to correct the base learner's mistakes
A variation of subagging that randomly subsamples the data at each iteration, rather than using the weights from the previous iteration
